---
name: Idea Proposal
about: Suggest a new idea, workflow expansion, or improvement
title: "[Idea] "
labels: ["idea"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe your idea in 2-5 sentences.

## Problem this solves

What pain point does this idea address?

## Proposed direction

How should this work at a high level?

## Scope

- [ ] Commands
- [ ] Agents
- [ ] Rules
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Can you implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] Maybe, need guidance
- [ ] No, sharing idea only

## Extra context

Add examples, references, or anything that helps.
